title: CMD.REF.001.BEN.ARCHIVE_BENEFICIARY — Archive a beneficiary record
description: Payload of the ARCHIVE_BENEFICIARY command. Flips referential_status from ACTIVE to ARCHIVED. Emits one RVT.REF.001.BENEFICIARY_REFERENTIAL_UPDATED with transition_kind=ARCHIVED. Idempotent on command_id over a 30-day window.

internal_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Canonical identifier of the beneficiary to archive.

reason.description: Optional categorisation of the archival reason. Used for downstream analytics.

comment.description: Optional free-text justification — e.g. operator note for audit. Stored alongside the transition; NOT part of PII.
